title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Durian Furniture

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Durian Furniture
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
